_publications._publicationTitle: Next-generation variant exon screening: Moving forward in routine genetic disease investigations.

_contextSnippet: Overall, the diagnostic rate of ES analysis (SNVs/INDELs) improved from 58% to 66% with ngVES analysis (SNVs/INDELs plus CNVs). This was considered a small, but clinically significant, increased diagnostic yield
details: Improved diagnostic rate from 58% (ES analysis alone) to 66% (ngVES analysis including SNVs/INDELs plus CNVs) in 134 patients with skin disease conditions
